allow: Bash(sqlite3 "c:/claude-code/Personale/compravendite/data/compravendite.db" "SELECT id, name, category FROM products WHERE category != category COLLATE NOCASE OR category LIKE ''%'' || LOWER\(SUBSTR\(category,1,1\)\) || ''%'' AND category != UPPER\(SUBSTR\(category,1,1\)\) || SUBSTR\(category,2\)")
